channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] [HOT] Universal Audio|Get up to 85% off in the Universal Audio UAD Half Yearly Sale.?NEW
[HOT] Softube|Get 33% off Bus Processor 670 by Softube. The discounted price is $99.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Cloudy Samples|Get 94% off Cinematic & Ambient Bundle by Cloudy Samples for $9.99 (Normally $170).?NEW
[SAVE BIG] [HOT] W.A. Production|Get 87% off Loop Engine 3 by W.A. Production for $14.90 (Normally $119)
[SAVE BIG] SampleHero|SampleHero is offering 86% off on Modern Percussion + Hybrid SFX library for Kontakt (full version). Use the code: SH_PercDeal_CRAZY
[HOT] The Drum Broker|The Drum Broker Memorial Day Sale – 50% off on sample packs, drum kits, drum breaks, one-ss and more. Use the coupon code: MEMORIAL26
item.description: Descuento: 50% - Desarrollador: The Drum Broker - Finaliza: 2026-05-31
